title: thlaspi montanum subsp. alpestre
intro: Thlaspi montanum subsp. alpestre, also known as mountain penny cress, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the mustard family that is native to the mountainous regions of Europe. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Thlaspi montanum subsp. alpestre include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system, making it a valuable herb for treating various health conditions. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and can also be used in cooking and as a garnish to add flavor and nutrition to various dishes.
